basic_details.short_information: GPSC Preliminary Exam Schedule 2026: The Gujarat Public Service Commission (GPSC) has officially released the detailed preliminary exam schedule for various Class-1 and Class-2 posts. Candidates who have applied for these GPSC recruitments can check the complete exam dates below. The preliminary examinations are scheduled from 30th May 2026 to 4th July 2026 in the afternoon shift (03:00 PM to 05:00 PM). All eligible candidates are advised to download the official notification and prepare accordingly.

important_dates.raw: Candidates can follow these simple steps to check and download the GPSC exam schedule from the official website: | Step 1: Visit the official website of GPSC at gpsc.gujarat.gov.in | Step 2: On the homepage, look for the "What's New" or "Notifications" / "Important Notices" section | Step 3: Find and click on the link titled "Important Notice Regarding Dates of Preliminary Exam" (dated April 2026) | Step 4: The notification PDF will open in a new window | Step 5: Read all details carefully including post-wise exam dates and timing | Step 6: Download and save the PDF for future reference | Step 7: Take a printout of the notification for your records | Direct Link: Click Here to Download GPSC Prelims Exam Schedule PDF

content_sections.heading: GPSC Preliminary Exam Schedule 2026 (Released) - Check Schedule & Details
content_sections.text: GPSC Preliminary Exam Schedule 2026: The Gujarat Public Service Commission (GPSC) has officially released the detailed preliminary exam schedule for various Class-1 and Class-2 posts. Candidates who have applied for these GPSC recruitments can check the complete exam dates below. The preliminary examinations are scheduled from 30th May 2026 to 4th July 2026 in the afternoon shift (03:00 PM to 05:00 PM). All eligible candidates are advised to download the official notification and prepare accordingly. Latest Update: GPSC has announced the preliminary exam dates for 21 posts on 6th April 2026. The examinations will be conducted on different dates at various centers across Gujarat. Candidates can download the detailed schedule notification from the official website gpsc.gujarat.gov.in. Quick Link: Download GPSC Preliminary Exam Schedule 2026 Notification Key Highlights - GPSC Preliminary Exam Schedule 2026 Organization: Gujarat Public Service Commission (GPSC) Post Name: Various Class-1 & Class-2 Posts (21 Posts) Exam Dates: 30 May 2026 to 04 July 2026 (Afternoon Shift) Exam Mode: Offline (Pen & Paper / OMR Based) Official Website: gpsc.gujarat.gov.in Admit Card Release: Expected 10-15 days before each exam date

content_sections.heading: GPSC Preliminary Exam Schedule 2026 Complete Details
content_sections.text: The Gujarat Public Service Commission (GPSC) has published the official preliminary exam schedule for multiple recruitments in 2026. This notification covers 21 different Class-1 and Class-2 posts across various departments. The preliminary test is the first stage of selection and will be followed by Mains Exam and Document Verification / Interview for qualified candidates.

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for GPSC Preliminary Exam 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must keep track of all important dates related to the GPSC recruitment process. Below is the complete timeline:

content_sections.heading: GPSC Preliminary Exam Dates 2026 (Post-wise Schedule)
content_sections.text: 30 May 2026 (03:00 PM - 05:00 PM): Veterinary Officer (Class-2) - Agriculture Dept., Municipal Corporations & Forest Dept. (Advt. 110/2025-26, 128/2025-26, 02/2026-27) 16 June 2026: Assistant Insurance Regulator, Lecturer (English), Assistant Professor (Geography, Botany) 23 June 2026: Child Development Scheme Officer, Assistant Professor (Zoology, Computer Science, Sociology, Political Science) 30 June 2026: Assistant Regulator (Industries), Assistant Professor (Automobile, Production, Mathematics) 04 July 2026: Lecturer (Architecture, Ceramic, Metallurgy), Assistant Professor (Philosophy), Assistant Labour Commissioner

content_sections.heading: How to Download GPSC Preliminary Exam Schedule 2026 Notification?
content_sections.text: Candidates can follow these simple steps to check and download the GPSC exam schedule from the official website: Step 1: Visit the official website of GPSC at gpsc.gujarat.gov.in Step 2: On the homepage, look for the "What's New" or "Notifications" / "Important Notices" section Step 3: Find and click on the link titled "Important Notice Regarding Dates of Preliminary Exam" (dated April 2026) Step 4: The notification PDF will open in a new window Step 5: Read all details carefully including post-wise exam dates and timing Step 6: Download and save the PDF for future reference Step 7: Take a printout of the notification for your records Direct Link: Click Here to Download GPSC Prelims Exam Schedule PDF

content_sections.heading: Important Links for GPSC Preliminary Exam 2026
GPSC Preliminary Exam Pattern 2026
content_sections.text: Understanding the exam pattern is crucial for effective preparation. Here's what candidates need to know:

content_sections.heading: Preparation Tips for GPSC Preliminary Exam 2026
content_sections.text: With the exam dates now announced, candidates should focus on smart preparation strategies: 1. Create a Study Schedule: Allocate time for General Studies and your specific subject based on the syllabus. 2. Focus on Previous Year Papers: Solve GPSC previous year question papers to understand the pattern. 3. Take Mock Tests: Practice full-length tests in afternoon shift timing to build stamina. 4. Revise Regularly: Make short notes for current affairs, Gujarat-specific topics, and technical subjects. 5. Stay Updated: Follow official GPSC website for any updates on admit card or changes.

content_sections.heading: GPSC Admit Card 2026 - When to Download?
content_sections.text: The GPSC will release the admit card for each preliminary exam approximately 10-15 days before the respective exam date. Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official website using their application number and date of birth. Documents Required on Exam Day: Printed copy of Admit Card Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhar Card/PAN Card/Driving License/Voter ID/Passport) Recent passport-size photographs (if specified) Black/Blue ballpoint pen for OMR sheet

content_sections.heading: What After the GPSC Preliminary Exam?
content_sections.text: After successfully appearing in the GPSC preliminary examination, candidates should: 1. Result Declaration: Preliminary results are usually declared within 1-2 months after the exam. 2. Answer Key: Provisional answer keys are released shortly after the exam for objections. 3. Next Stage: Qualified candidates will proceed to Mains Written Examination followed by Interview / Document Verification. Disclaimer: The information provided above is based on the official notification released by Gujarat Public Service Commission (GPSC). Candidates are advised to visit the official website gpsc.gujarat.gov.in for the most accurate and updated information.

faq.question: Q1. When is the GPSC Preliminary Exam scheduled for 2026?
faq.answer: The preliminary exams for 21 posts are scheduled between 30 May 2026 and 04 July 2026 in afternoon shift.

faq.question: Q2. Where can I download the GPSC preliminary exam schedule notification?
faq.answer: You can download it from the official website gpsc.gujarat.gov.in or use the direct link provided above.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any change in the GPSC exam dates 2026?
faq.answer: The dates are as per the latest notification released on 06 April 2026. Any changes will be updated on the official GPSC website.

faq.question: Q4. When will the GPSC admit card be released?
faq.answer: Admit cards are expected 10-15 days before the respective preliminary exam date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the exam mode for GPSC Preliminary 2026?
faq.answer: The examination will be conducted in Offline (OMR Based) mode.
